title: Fearsome Foes
description: Remodels and re-textures some hostile mobs to appear more menacing!
body:
**REQUIRES EMF & ETF**

[Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/project/BVzZfTc1)


[Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/project/4I1XuqiY)

Texture pack is still a work in progress. More mobs will be changed in the future
# 
Changes the textures and models of most hostile mobs, while trying to keep some of the vanilla characteristics.
#
**Features**

<details>
<summary>New Models and Textures</summary>
Many of the common hostile mobs have new models and textures, that keep some elements of their vanilla textures.

  
The list includes:
- Zombies
- Husks
- Drowned
- Skeletons
- Wither Skeletons (Renamed to Withered)
- Strays
- Bogged
- Spiders
- Cave Spiders (Renamed to Recluse)
- Pillagers
- Vindicators
- Evokers
- Witches
- Illusioners
- Endermen
- Shulkers
- Endermites
- Blazes

# 
![A zombie, skeleton, spider and creeper displayed above oak logs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fec1e008d83574d9c3c42164e7253b044a0287af.png)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Texture Variants</summary>
Some mobs have texture variants, with some textures being biome dependent.

The list includes:
- Zombies
- Skeletons
- Spiders
- Cave Spiders
- Creepers
- Endermen
- Endermites
- Slimes
- Husks
- Drowned
- Wither Skeletons
- Pillagers
- Vindicators
  
# 
![A zombie, skeleton, spider and creeper displayed above cut sandstone blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d01f3bff4ffe06ba483fbbdd94fff3940a5710b6.png)


![A zombie, skeleton, spider and creeper being displayed ontop of a bamboo block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/270f73074a2f5977cf89eeaf5d42cc2ed734144a.png)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Unique Item Textures</summary>
Mobs that naturally spawn with weapons or tools have a unique texture when holding an item. 
This feature requires versions above 1.21.4 as it uses item model definitions. 

# 

![A drowned, stray, wither skeleton and zombified piglin displayed above oak logs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/400e63f34e35e3d7dfb1d70c0e1e3ceaf253fc5c.png)

![A display of various tools and weapons that are held by hostile mobs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/85d799eb26d0eca0bb48d4390361f4915407b840.png)

</details>
